:::{.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Versiones de R y de los paquetes utilizados

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
v <- paste(R.version$major, R.version$minor, sep = ".")
cat(sprintf("![](https://img.shields.io/badge/R-%s-276DC3?logo=r)\n", v))

pkgs <- sessioninfo::package_info(pkgs = .packages(), dependencies = FALSE)
pkgs <- pkgs[pkgs$package %in% packages, ]

for (i in seq_len(nrow(pkgs))) {
  name    <- pkgs$package[i]
  version <- pkgs$ondiskversion[i]
  source  <- pkgs$source[i]
  color   <- if (grepl("CRAN", source)) "blue" else "orange"

  url <- sprintf(
    "https://img.shields.io/badge/%s-%s-%s?logo=r",
    URLencode(name, reserved = TRUE),
    URLencode(version, reserved = TRUE),
    color
  )
  cat(sprintf("![%s](%s) ", name, url))
}
```
:::
